blended.narrative: Sunshine Village is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 4,012 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
